source_intent.raw_intent: Case 090: I am a chaotic_power_user in global_cross_border. Build a srx_ace_workflow for blueprint_design_doc using the sovereign_lens. Chaos input type is depth_tier_ambiguity. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Produce a governed srx_ace_workflow artifact for blueprint_design_doc using the sovereign_lens, handling chaotic input with depth_tier_ambiguity and explicit validation gates. Scope: - Parse messy input (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria) into a structured workflow with validation gates. Output must be SR8-compilable into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract. Constraints: - Must use sovereign_lens for governance and validation. - Must include explicit validation gates at each workflow step. - Must handle depth_tier_ambiguity by resolving to D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE. - Output must be strict JSON with no markdown fences. - Must not claim completion if any blocker exists. Success Criteria: - Workflow artifact is valid srx_ace_workflow type. - All sections (objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract) are present and compilable. - Validation gates are explicitly defined and traceable. - Chaotic input is resolved without loss of governance. Output Contract: - artifact_type: srx_ace_workflow - depth_tier: D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE - runtime_target: Codex - should_block: False - blocked_reason: None - compiled_intent: objective: Produce a governed srx_ace_workflow artifact for blueprint_design_doc using the sovereign_lens, handling chaotic input with depth_tier_ambiguity and explicit validation gates.; scope: Parse messy input (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria) into a structured workflow with validation gates. Output must be SR8-compilable into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.; constraints: Must use sovereign_lens for governance and validation.; Must include explicit validation gates at each workflow step.; Must handle depth_tier_ambiguity by resolving to D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE.; Output must be strict JSON with no markdown fences.; Must not claim completion if any blocker exists.; success_criteria: Workflow artifact is valid srx_ace_workflow type.; All sections (objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract) are present and compilable.; Validation gates are explicitly defined and traceable.; Chaotic input is resolved without loss of governance.; output_contract: This JSON object.
